title: custom_emoji_query sends filter:null instead of omitting it
description: custom_emoji_query builds filter_val = serde_json::Value::Null when filter_space_id is None, then always includes filter:null in the JMAP args. RFC 8620 §5.5 specifies that filter SHOULD be omitted when not filtering, not sent as null. Some strict server implementations may reject null as an invalid filter type. All other optional parameters (position, limit) in the same method are conditionally inserted only when Some. Pattern: use args[filter].take() or build the args map without the filter key when filter_space_id is None.
